metadata.description: Dense temporal chunks for ITS collision clip 3

chunks.description: Normal traffic flow at a signalized intersection. A white sedan at the top of the frame begins moving forward, while a maroon sedan behind it remains stationary. A red sedan approaches from the bottom right traveling straight through the intersection.
The white sedan initiates a left-hand turn across oncoming traffic without yielding. The red sedan continues straight, closing the gap rapidly.
A T-bone collision occurs as the red sedan strikes the passenger side of the white sedan. Both vehicles lose momentum from the impact.
Both vehicles come to rest in the intersection. The white sedan has been pushed across the crosswalk. The maroon sedan behind has stopped safely without involvement.
